---
title: "SY5Y; TPM-normalized transcript filters (ONT R10)"
author: "Fabian Jetzinger"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
params:
  fl_threshold: 1
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    theme: spacelab
    self_contained: true
    fig_width: 18
    fig_height: 12
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 12,
  fig.height = 9
)

library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)

r_source_dir <- if (dir.exists("R")) "R" else "src/plotting/R"

source(file.path(r_source_dir, "00_figure_config.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "02_themes.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "03_plot_functions.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "01_config_ont_r10.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "07_ont_r10_sy5y.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "09_filter_level_lines.R"))

thr <- as.numeric(params$fl_threshold)
out_dir <- plot_creation_ont_r10_dir()
```

```{r check-paths, results="asis"}
check_paths_ont_r10()
```

```{r load-tpm-data}
all_tpm <- list()
for (tool in SY5Y_TOOL_ORDER) {
  raw <- load_sy5y_bclass_list(ont_r10_report_dirs[[tool]])
  all_tpm[[tool]] <- build_sy5y_tpm_curve_data(raw, fl_threshold = thr)
}

all_tpms <- unlist(lapply(all_tpm, function(x) x$TPM))
min_tpm <- min(all_tpms[all_tpms > 0])
max_tpm <- max(all_tpms)
log_thresholds <- 10^seq(log10(min_tpm), log10(max_tpm), length.out = 200)
linear_upper <- quantile(all_tpms, 0.995)
linear_thresholds <- seq(0, linear_upper, length.out = 200)
```

```{r tpm-summary, echo=TRUE, results="asis"}
cat("=== ONT R10 SY5Y TPM distribution ===\n")
cat(sprintf("  min (nonzero): %.2f\n", min_tpm))
cat(sprintf("  max:           %.0f\n", max_tpm))
cat(sprintf("  99.5th pctl:   %.1f\n", linear_upper))
for (tool in SY5Y_TOOL_ORDER) {
  cat(sprintf("\n%s:\n", tool))
  print(round(pick_tpm_quantiles(data.frame(TPM = all_tpm[[tool]]$TPM)), 2))
}
```

```{r tpm-legend, fig.width=18, fig.height=2.5}
tpm_line_legend <- build_tpm_line_legend_figure(category_layout = c(2, 3))
paper_ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "sy5y_tpm_lines_legend.pdf"),
  plot = tpm_line_legend,
  size = "sy5y_legend_strip"
)
tpm_line_legend
```

```{r tpm-lines-log}
log_line_plots <- list()
for (tool in SY5Y_TOOL_ORDER) {
  curve <- compute_survival_curve(all_tpm[[tool]], log_thresholds, simplify = TRUE)
  log_line_plots[[tool]] <- create_tpm_line_plot(
    curve, tool, log_x = TRUE, xlim = c(0.05, 15)
  )
}
log_fig <- assemble_ont_r10_tpm_line_figure(
  log_line_plots,
  title = sy5y_plot_title("Transcripts by TPM threshold"),
  log_x = TRUE
)
paper_ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "sy5y_tpm_lines_log.pdf"),
  plot = log_fig,
  size = "sy5y_tpm_2x2"
)
log_fig
```

```{r tpm-lines-linear}
lin_line_plots <- list()
for (tool in SY5Y_TOOL_ORDER) {
  curve <- compute_survival_curve(all_tpm[[tool]], linear_thresholds, simplify = TRUE)
  lin_line_plots[[tool]] <- create_tpm_line_plot(
    curve, tool, log_x = FALSE, xlim = c(0, 15)
  )
}
lin_fig <- assemble_ont_r10_tpm_line_figure(
  lin_line_plots,
  title = sy5y_plot_title("Transcripts by TPM threshold (linear scale)"),
  log_x = FALSE
)
paper_ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "sy5y_tpm_lines_linear.pdf"),
  plot = lin_fig,
  size = "sy5y_tpm_2x2"
)
lin_fig
```

PDFs written to `plot_creation_ont_r10/`: `sy5y_tpm_lines_legend.pdf`, `sy5y_tpm_lines_log.pdf`, `sy5y_tpm_lines_linear.pdf`.
